import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';


const initialForm = {
  name: '',
  dob: '',
  gender: 'male',
  hobby_music: false,
  hobby_sports: false,
  bio: '',
  appointment_date: '',
  appointment_time: '',
  am_pm: 'AM',
  time_24h: '',
  city: '',
  country: ''
};

export default function App() {
  const [entries, setEntries] = useState([]);
  const [form, setForm] = useState(initialForm);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  const canSubmit = useMemo(() => {
    return form.name.trim() && form.dob;
  }, [form.name, form.dob]);

  async function loadEntries() {
    setError('');
    const res = await fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/entries');
    const data = await res.json();
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data?.error || 'Failed to load');
    setEntries(data);
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    loadEntries();
  }, []);

  function handleChange(e) {
    const { name, type, value, checked } = e.target;

    if (type === 'checkbox') {
      setForm((f) => ({ ...f, [name]: checked }));
    } else {
      setForm((f) => ({ ...f, [name]: value }));
    }
  }

  async function onSubmit(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');

    if (!canSubmit) {
      setError('name and dob are required');
      return;
    }

    const payload = {
      ...form,
      
    };

    const res = await fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/entries', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(payload)
    });

    const data = await res.json();
    if (!res.ok) {
      setError(data?.error || 'Submit failed');
      return;
    }

    setForm(initialForm);
    await loadEntries();
  }


  return (
    <>
      <h2>Fullstack Form</h2>
      {error ? <p>{error}</p> : null}

      <form onSubmit={onSubmit}>

        <label>
          Name 
          <input name="name" value={form.name} onChange={handleChange} type="text" required />
        </label>

        <label>
          Date of birth 
          <input name="dob" value={form.dob} onChange={handleChange} type="date" required />
        </label>

        <fieldset>
          <legend>Gender </legend>
          <label>
            <input
              type="radio"
              name="gender"
              value="male"
              checked={form.gender === 'male'}
              onChange={handleChange}
            />
            Male
          </label>
          <label>
            <input
              type="radio"
              name="gender"
              value="female"
              checked={form.gender === 'female'}
              onChange={handleChange}
            />
            Female
          </label>
        </fieldset>

        <fieldset>
          <legend>Hobbies (checkboxes)</legend>
          <label>
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              name="hobby_music"
              checked={form.hobby_music}
              onChange={handleChange}
            />
            Music
          </label>
          <label>
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              name="hobby_sports"
              checked={form.hobby_sports}
              onChange={handleChange}
            />
            Sports
          </label>
        </fieldset>

        <label>
          Bio 
          <textarea name="bio" value={form.bio} onChange={handleChange} rows={3} />
        </label>

        <label>
          Appointment date (date)
          <input name="appointment_date" value={form.appointment_date} onChange={handleChange} type="date" />
        </label>

        <label>
          Appointment time (time input)
          <input
            name="appointment_time"
            value={form.appointment_time}
            onChange={handleChange}
            type="time"
            step="60"
          />
        </label>

        <label>
          AM/PM 
          <select name="am_pm" value={form.am_pm} onChange={handleChange}>
            <option value="AM">AM</option>
            <option value="PM">PM</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label>
          24h time 
          <input name="time_24h" value={form.time_24h} onChange={handleChange} type="time" step="60" />
        </label>

        <label>
          City (text)
          <input name="city" value={form.city} onChange={handleChange} type="text" />
        </label>

        <label>
          Country (text)
          <input name="country" value={form.country} onChange={handleChange} type="text" />
        </label>

        <button type="submit" disabled={!canSubmit}>
          Submit
        </button>
        
      </form>

      <h3>History</h3>
      {entries.length === 0 ? (
        <p>No entries yet.</p>
      ) : (
        <div style={{ display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', gap: '12px' }}>
          {entries.map((en) => (
            <div key={en.id}>
              <p><strong>{en.name}</strong> (ID: {en.id})</p>
              <p>DOB: {en.dob} | Gender: {en.gender}</p>
              <p>Hobbies: {[en.hobby_music && 'Music', en.hobby_sports && 'Sports'].filter(Boolean).join(', ') || '-'}</p>
              {en.appointment_date && <p>Appointment: {en.appointment_date} {en.appointment_time ? `at ${en.appointment_time} ${en.am_pm}` : ''}</p>}
              
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </>
  );
}





const express = require('express');
const cors = require('cors');
const mysql = require('mysql2/promise');

const app = express();
app.use(cors());
app.use(express.json());

const PORT = 5000;

const db = mysql.createPool({
  host:  'localhost',
  user:  'root',
  password:  '2004',
  database:  'formdb',
  waitForConnections: true,
  connectionLimit: 10,
  queueLimit: 0
});

async function initializeDatabase() {
  try {
    const connection = await db.getConnection();
    await connection.query('CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS alt');
    await connection.query('USE alt');
 
    await connection.query(`
      CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS form_entries (
        id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
        created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
        name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
        dob DATE NOT NULL,
        gender VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
        hobby_music TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
        hobby_sports TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
        bio TEXT,
        appointment_date DATE DEFAULT NULL,
        appointment_time TIME DEFAULT NULL,
        am_pm VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL,
        time_24h TIME DEFAULT NULL,
        city VARCHAR(80) DEFAULT NULL,
        country VARCHAR(80) DEFAULT NULL
      )
    `);
    
    connection.release();
    console.log('✓ Database and table initialized successfully');
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('✗ Database initialization failed:', err);
    process.exit(1);
  }
}

function toUTCISODate(dateStr) {
  return dateStr;
}

app.get('/api/entries', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const [rows] = await db.query('SELECT * FROM form_entries ORDER BY id DESC');
    res.json(rows);
  } catch (err) {
    res.status(500).json({ error: String(err.message || err) });
  }
});

app.post('/api/entries', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const b = req.body;
    if (!b.name || !b.dob) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'name and dob are required' });
    }

    const [result] = await db.query(
      `INSERT INTO form_entries
      (name, dob, gender, hobby_music, hobby_sports, bio, appointment_date, appointment_time, am_pm, time_24h, city, country)
      VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`,
      [
        b.name,
        toUTCISODate(b.dob),
        b.gender,
        b.hobby_music ? 1 : 0,
        b.hobby_sports ? 1 : 0,
        b.bio || '',
        b.appointment_date || null,
        b.appointment_time || null,
        b.am_pm || null,
        b.time_24h || null,
        b.city || null,
        b.country || null
      ]
    );

    console.log('✓ Data inserted with ID:', result.insertId);
    const [rows] = await db.query('SELECT * FROM form_entries WHERE id = ?', [result.insertId]);
    res.json(rows[0]);
  } catch (err) {
    res.status(500).json({ err });
  }
});

initializeDatabase().then(() => {
  app.listen(PORT, () => {
    console.log(`✓ Server running on http://localhost:${PORT}`);
  });
});





fetch('http://localhost:5000/api/entries', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json'
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    name: 'Test User',
    dob: '2004-01-01'
  })
})
.then(res => res.json())
.then(data => console.log(data))
.catch(err => console.error(err));







function handleChange(e) {
  const { name, type, value, checked } = e.target;

  if (type === "checkbox") {
    setForm(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [name]: checked
        ? [...prev[name], value]
        : prev[name].filter(item => item !== value)
    }));
  } else {
    setForm(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [name]: value
    }));
  }
}





<input
  type="checkbox"
  name="hobbies"
  value="music"
  checked={form.hobbies.includes("music")}
  onChange={handleChange}
/>
Music


<input
  type="checkbox"
  name="hobbies"
  value="sports"
  checked={form.hobbies.includes("sports")}
  onChange={handleChange}
/>
Sports



const nameRegex = /^(?=.*[a-z])(?=.*[A-Z])(?=.*\d)(?=.*[^A-Za-z0-9]).{1,30}$/;

function handleSubmit(e) {
  e.preventDefault();

  if (!nameRegex.test(form.name)) {
    alert("Name must be 1-30 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, number, and special character");
    return;
  }

  // continue submit logic here
}

<label>
  Name
  <input
    name="name"
    value={form.name}
    onChange={handleChange}
    type="text"
    required
    maxLength={30}
  />
</label>
